source.caption: Changement de plan (b) : le plan oblique (ABC) est mis de bout par un nouveau plan horizontal H'. La nouvelle ligne de terre H'L'T' donne la projection auxiliaire A^H' B^H' C^H' alignee (vue de bout du plan).

notes: Sub-figure (b) of a sideways change-of-plane plate. Original two projections about the drawn LT (f^H), recall lines pixel-vertical; the new ground line H'L'T' is the near-vertical oblique line, and the auxiliary A^H' B^H' C^H' is the edge-on (mise de bout) view of the oblique plane (ABC), hence collinear. The plate's second construction (true-shape rabattu A^V' B^V' C^V') is ignored.
